text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to deliver some important training
paperwork, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... My stomach was grumbling all class. All that thinking is probably to blame.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But that's normal for you, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you think so? I don't know, I feel like it's a
little louder today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Want to come with me for some
ramen?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the offer, I do. But, I can't today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are you... feeling tired? You don't seem like
yourself today...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't be silly. I'm always like this.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm simply not in the mood for ramen today, that's
all. Maybe another time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, th-that's fine. It's just—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm down for some ramen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hang on, El! What if Grass—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe! Spe! Don't poke the hornet's nest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Eek! Nope, not a thing! Come on, let's get to
slurping!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But we can't just leave her like this.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's fine, it's fine! See you around, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I expected El to say something, but even
Spe was on to me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How awfully perceptive of them, hehe. I guess
they really are looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I knew it. Merely increasing the length of my
training sessions does nothing but wear me out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I need to improve my baseline endurance and
consider what's efficient...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No more going easy on myself. I need to get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strict self-discipline and passion that Grass
Wonder hides from those around her are the fuel
that drives her to grow.
